features: 🍉Package Contents: You will get 200 pieces cotton buds in 1 boxes, whether you’re applying makeup professionally or just doing your hygiene routine, these cotton ear buds are here to do the job.
🍋Materials: These cotton swabs are made of quality organic cotton with strict sterilization process, soft and absorbent. Swabs handle made of bamboo can reduce waste of energy.
🍓With Storage Box: All cotton buds are placed in a storage box, easy to take and store, with cover design to keep unused cotton swabs clean, and easy to carry at the same time.

🐳Double-Pointed Design: The cosmetic cotton swabs are designed with double ends, both ends can be used for different purposes; the cotton swabs for makeup are highly absorbent and soft, and the spiral winding makes them stick firmly to the wooden stick and will not fall off easily.
🍷Wide Use: The pointed cotton tip is suitable for use as a cosmetic swab to remove redundant eyeliner, eyebrows, eye shadow and lipstick; It can also be used for household cleaning, painting, etc.
description: Product description NINFEIQI 200 pk Bamboo Cotton Buds, Biodegradable Cotton Swab with Wooden Handles for Cleaning Ear, Makeup, Keyboard, Wound etc Features: Cotton swabs for makeup is made of high-quality wooden handle and cotton material, which does not shed lint and is not easy to break. These wooden stick cotton swabs are highly absorbent and soft, double-ended design, spiral winding to make it stick firmly to the stick and won't fall off easily. Suitable for removing excess eyeliner, eyebrows, eye shadow, makeup, etc., or for daily care, whether for daily body care, precise make-up or cleaning sensitive areas. Specifications: Material: wooden handle + cotton swabs Color: white, pink, blue, black, green, yellow Size: as shown Package Includes: 200 cotton sticks in box Safety Warning: May cause skin irritation if not used carefully. Keep away from sources of ignition. If you have any questions about the pointed cotton swab, please contact us in time, we will solve your questions. Safety Warning safety
